name: polis
description: Context engineering + spec-driven development with isolated subagents for Codex CLI.
//: Codex plugin manifest (official .codex-plugin/plugin.json, per the March 2026 plugin spec). Skills are discovered under .agents/skills/. Hook and subagent wiring for config.toml is provided as TOML fragments in scripts/fragments/ and applied by scripts/install.sh. Codex runs command hooks only -- prompt/agent handlers are parsed but skipped.
